resources.string: Screen Time needs access to app usage statistics so it can track and limit screen time. Tap below to open system settings.
Usage access granted. Tracking is now running.
Detects which app is in the foreground so Screen Time can block apps when daily limits are reached.
Screen Time needs permission to show the block screen over other apps when time\'s up. Tap below to open system settings.
Screen Time needs the accessibility service to detect which app is open and enforce limits. Tap below to open system settings.
All permissions granted. Enforcement is now active.
